---
title: "HW5_CSchuler"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-10"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r library setup}

library(maps)
library(mapdata)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(cowplot)
library(dplyr)

```

```{r 2a}

# #2a
states = map_data("state")
california = states %>% filter(region == "california")

```

```{r 2b}

# #2b
load("G:/My Drive/Personal/Grad Program/DSC 502 - Data Visualization for EDA/R Scripts./wind_turbines.rda")
wind_ca = wind_turbines %>% filter(t_state == "CA")

```

```{r 2c}

# #2c
ggplot(data=california, aes(x=long, y=lat, group=group)) +
  geom_polygon(fill="darkblue", color="black")

```

```{r 2d}

# #2d
ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data=california, aes(x=long, y=lat, group=group), fill="darkblue", color="black") +
  geom_point(data=wind_ca, aes(x=xlong, y=ylat), color="orange") +
  coord_fixed(1.3)

```
